failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: rolling train-only dual-direction quantile-cell score surface selecting intraday US100 M5 candidates by score-conditioned schedule
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0002 run must change a meaningful model, score, feature, label, or trade-shape surface, not nudge R0003 cell thresholds or reuse the dual-direction cell score as-is
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence had negative total net PnL with 6 losing folds, 3 profitable folds, and entries per active day below the 5 to 10 target

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar logic parity passed exactly, but tick execution worsened total net PnL and shifted exit timing/reason on multiple folds; tick execution remains the economic surface.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether a rolling train-only discrete dual-direction cell score can choose both direction and timing from closed-bar US100 M5 candidates without freezing any model family or feature set
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: third C0002 true variant; changes the score model family from R0001 and R0002 linear score surfaces to quantile-cell directional score ranking, not a threshold, window, SLTP, or retry nudge

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
proxy must fit score cells only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report score diagnostics with applies true
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, and lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

feature.summary: closed-bar return, range, bar-body, close-position, volatility-context, and session-position features; no feature set selected

label.summary: train-only directional target-before-stop plus forward path quality label over a 12-bar closed-bar horizon; no label selected

model.summary: rolling train-only discrete quantile-cell score with direction fallback; no model family or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: evaluate both long and short candidates per eligible closed bar, let the score choose one direction per bar and up to eight entries per active day, then replay fixed-lot stop-target-max-hold paths
